payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet with vertical paneled doors and a visible vertical metal handle on the right door; there is a noticeable glare/reflection on the central panel and the right edge of the cabinet is partially cropped by the image border, suggesting the object is close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m away).
